title: BulkDeleteStaleRequest
description: Request to soft-delete entities within a scope that were not reported by the ingestion connector in the current run (stale entities).

scopeFqn.description: Fully qualified name of the scope (service, database, or databaseSchema) within which stale entities are detected.

scopeEntityType.description: Entity type of the scope FQN, for example service, database, or databaseSchema.

seenFqns.description: Fully qualified names of entities reported by the connector in the current run. Entities in the scope not present in this list are considered stale.

dryRun.description: When true, the response lists entities that would be deleted without performing the deletion.

hardDelete.description: When true, stale entities are hard-deleted. When false (default), they are soft-deleted.

recursive.description: When true (default), deleting a stale entity also deletes its children.
